About Me

Designing with
intention

I'm David Adebayo, a Full-Stack Developer and Computer Science graduate from McPherson University. Based in Lagos, I specialize in building high-performance digital products — from 80+ bespoke WordPress themes to robust full-stack applications.

My background at Meebol Web Technology involved leading design teams and mentoring over 80 developers. I believe the best products balance engineering excellence with user-centric product management.

React / Next.js
Node.js / Express
WordPress Development
TypeScript / JS
CSS / TailwindCSS
Figma & UI Design
System Design
Product Management

Featured case studies

Meebol — Custom eCommerce Platform

Meebol required a fast, scalable eCommerce platform capable of handling thousands of products without compromising on performance or design flexibility. Their previous setup was slow, frustrating for users, and difficult to manage on the backend.

I developed a bespoke WordPress WooCommerce theme from the ground up. The custom architecture integrated secure payment gateways, advanced AJAX product filtering, and an intuitive dashboard, treating performance as a first-class requirement.

Page load time dropped to 1.8s. Within three months, sales increased by 45%, and the client team reported a 60% reduction in time spent managing inventory. The new platform achieved a 96 on Google Lighthouse.

View Live Site
4.9★
App Store
−62%
Churn Rate
120k
Active Users
02

Enthronement Assembly — Locator App

Enthronement Assembly needed a streamlined way for members to discover and join nearby 'Love Circle' fellowship centers. The coordination overhead for administrators was extremely high, and users struggled to find locations based on their exact geographical coordinates.

I built a robust full-stack web application implementing custom geolocation algorithms. The platform features a public-facing discovery app and a secure admin panel with role-based authentication and real-time request tracking, designed for maximum scalability.

Over 50+ centers successfully onboarded in the first phase. The platform reduced manual admin overhead by 80%. Users can now seamlessly find and request to join the nearest center in under 3 clicks, significantly boosting community engagement.

View Demo
